eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Mahoning, OH; at 12:34 PM ON APR 16, 2026 Effective until 02:34 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: There is a large gas leak on Oregon Ave. in Sebring.  The Fire Department is on scene with the gas provider correcting the situation. Please evacuate the area between East Ohio Ave. and East Pennsylvania Ave. between 12th Street and 15th Street for two (2) hours.
